notes: Marco: 'I always dive with two independent light sources on wreck penetrations. Redundancy matters more than power when you're inside a wreck. Even a 50-lumen backup can guide you out if your primary fails.'
output_text: A 50-lumen backup can guide you out if your primary fails.
